productDisplayName: Q&Q Unisex White Analog Dial Watches
description: Case style: Analogue watch with white plastic square case Dial style: White dial with black hands Strap style: White plastic strap with a tang clasp Features: Branding on the 9 hour mark and a screw to reset time Water resistance to 5 BAR, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing Warranty: 1 year
